Our Plans

Choose the environment that best fits your business phase and start producing today.

Individual Plans

Perfect for freelancers, digital nomads, and independent professionals looking for a focused and professional environment.

  • check_circle Desk in a high-standard shared environment
  • check_circle Ultra-high-speed internet (dedicated optical fiber)
  • check_circle Access to lounge areas and unlimited coffee

Investment

R$ 50/day

Schedule a Visit

Private Offices

Exclusive offices for companies and teams that value culture, focus, and total privacy.

  • check_circle Modular capacity for teams of 2 to 20 people
  • check_circle 100% furnished and air-conditioned environment
  • check_circle Acoustic isolation and individual biometric access

Monthly Plans

Upon request

Request Quote

Evolution in Details

location_on

In the heart of Porto Maravilha

Avenida Venezuela, 27, Porto Maravilha.. Where historical Rio meets technological innovation and contemporary design.

directions_walk
Mobility

3 minutes from the VLT Parada dos Museus and easy access to the Subway and ferries.

restaurant
Lifestyle

Surrounded by cultural centers, Museums (MAR and Amanhã) and the vibrant gastronomy of the Port.
